subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath come before the Divine Throne, and We have found it sanctified from the mention of others and purified from the allusions of the heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک لدی العرش وجدناه مقدسا عن ذکر الاغیار و مطهرا عن اشارات الغافلین
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
